alpha.description: Entry-level Primal Nemesis dinos. Slightly stronger than vanilla.

apex.description: Mid-tier threat. Significantly tougher than Alpha.

frost.description: Elemental variant — ice themed, some slow effects.

plague.description: Disease/debuff mechanics. Worse than raw stats suggest.

boss.description: Summoned boss creatures. Includes Colossuses, DodoRex, etc.

youngling.description: Titan growth stage 1 — disables flyer debuff.
